blurb.en: Among all screened tickers, INTU is showing the strongest entry signal right now. It has retraced 65.7% from its peak, with RSI at the 20th percentile — historically one of the better setups for a Smart DCA trigger. Formula score: 87.0/100.
blurb.zh: 本期所有篩選標的中，INTU 的入場訊號最強。距高點回撤 65.7%，RSI 百分位 20%，歷史上這個位置的定投勝率相對較高。公式評分：87.0/100。

blurb.en: NFLX has dipped 40.0% off its 52-week high — meaningful for a name of this size and stability. With RSI at just the 2th percentile, momentum is compressed. Smart DCA score: 79.8/100.
blurb.zh: NFLX 距 52 週高點下滑 40.0%，對這類規模的藍籌股來說是相當顯著的回撤。RSI 僅在第 2 百分位，動能明顯收縮。智能定投評分：79.8/100。

blurb.en: GILD is down 19.4% from its high, placing RSI at the 15th historical percentile. Growth names can swing hard — this kind of reset is where our AI formula tends to find value. Entry score: 79.6/100.
blurb.zh: GILD 距高點下跌 19.4%，RSI 歷史百分位 15%。成長股波動大，這類深度修正正是 AI 公式設計尋找的入場點。入場評分：79.6/100。

blurb.en: GLD has pulled back 22.1% with RSI at the 10th percentile — a combination that historically precedes recoveries in this asset class. Smart DCA score: 83.2/100.
blurb.zh: GLD 回撤 22.1%，RSI 百分位 10%。這種組合在此類資產的歷史中常出現在反彈前夕。公式評分：83.2/100。
